resources.string: Blackout display matrix & save OLED pixels while keeping audio active.
Press any remote key to return.
Dims screen. TV remote key dismisses.
Tip: Start audio on your favorite app, then open AetherScreen TV to dim the screen.
To dim the screen or turn off pixels while preserving audio, AetherScreen TV needs permission to draw over other apps.

1. Click 'Open Settings' below.
2. If you are taken to a list, look for 'AetherScreen TV' and select it.
3. Turn the switch to 'Allowed' (or 'On').

Alternative path: Go to TV Home Settings -> Apps -> Special app access -> Display over other apps -> AetherScreen TV.
